mentions.note: Stock down 40% from Aug high despite strong fundamentals; provides data, odds, betting tools for sports industry (picks-and-shovels model); CEO sees Winter Olympics (NHL) and World Cup 2026 (48 teams, 100+ matches) as huge catalysts; California, Florida, Texas represent >50% of US GDP opportunity; Cramer thinks stock too cheap and belongs higher; waiting to see if 2026 event volumes drive analyst recognition.
